IRIS.fallback: none; stop IRIS body changes if missing in the active IRIS repo
not_required_for: HARNESS repo common workflow docs maintenance
notes: Do not place IRIS_SPEC_AUTHORITY.md in HARNESS.
The old absolute path authority is deprecated / historical reference only.
.env.example changes normally require a dedicated env-policy PR.
R3/high-risk source changes require human review.

FUNKY.authority_source: docs/funky/SPEC.md or existing FUNKY authority docs
not_required_for: HARNESS repo common workflow docs maintenance
notes: Use scripts/verify-funky.sh as the standard verification entry.
Keep backend, frontend, contracts, and NFT checks.
Do not mix source, docs, env, and harness changes in one PR.

IRIS-live2d-renderer.authority_source: renderer repo SPEC / REVIEW_POLICY / QUALITY docs
not_required_for: HARNESS repo common workflow docs maintenance
notes: Human review is required for Live2D cue schema, renderer boundary, public summary, adapter handoff, and engine response normalization.
Do not force R3 down to R2 or R1.
Common workflow docs may be maintained without project-local authority files.
